versions.version_description: Complete and readably formatted / two versions (basic/elaborate) / short tabs for intro and verse pattern / suggestions for voicings.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Sara chords
Fleetwood Mac  1979 *

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sara_(Fleetwood_Mac_song)

[tab][ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
4x fingerpicked[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Wait a minute, baby.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Stay with me awhile.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
Said you'd give me light,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
but you never told me about the fire.[/tab]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
 Drowning in the sea of love,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
where everyone would love to drown.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But now its gone,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
it doesn't matter what for.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
When you build your house,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
then call me, call me.[/tab]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] 2x
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 2x

[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
And he was just like a great dark wing[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
Within the wings of a storm.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
I think I had met my match.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
He was singing, and undoing,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
and undoing.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
Ooh, the laces,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
undoing the laces.[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
   in the sea of love,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
where everyone would love to drown.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But now it's gone,[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
they say it doesn't matter anymore.[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
When you build your house,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
then please call me, call me.[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
Sara, you're the poet in my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Never change, and don't you ever stop.[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But now it's gone, no[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
it doesn't matter anymore.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
But when you build your house, I'll come by[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, Sara        3x[/tab]

* Alternate:

Capo III

[ch]F[/ch]  = [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] = [ch]F#m[/ch]
[ch]Dm[/ch] = [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  = [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]E[/ch]

Set8
